name: Fudge Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in espresso.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each.
4. Place chocolate chips in a 4-cup measure or small bowl. Microwave at MEDIUM (50%) for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring 2 or 3 times until melted.
5. Stir chocolate, flour, and pecans into the butter, sugar, egg mixture.
6. Pour into pie shell.
7. Bake on a broiling trivet set on LOW MIX for 24 to 28 minutes.
8. Cool.
9. Fold in rum extract into whipped cream.
10. Spread on top of pie and decorate with sprinkles.
